title: Teenage skin woes: 7 herbal tinctures for oily skin
description: Lavandula angustifolia tinctures can be beneficial for oily skin due to its soothing and balancing properties. The main constituents of Lavandula angustifolia, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, have a calming effect on the skin and can help reduce inflammation. These compounds can also help to regulate the skin's oil production, which can help to alleviate oily skin symptoms.
